ModMetaData.name: Vault-Tec - Retexture
ModMetaData.author: Farxmai2
ModMetaData.description: A few minor fixes and a bunch of new textures for an old but beloved mod. All textures are made by me, and are free to use for anyone who wants to use them, but I ask that you credit me if you do. I also ask that you don't use them for commercial purposes, but other than that, go nuts.

li.displayName: Vault-Tec - Handy things for your vault!
